name: Smart Model Router
description: Dynamically selects the best AI model for each conversation turn based on semantic prompt classification, capabilities, cost, and latency.

enabled.label: Enable Smart Routing
enabled.help: When disabled, OpenClaw uses its default model for all turns.

fallbackModel.label: Fallback Model
fallbackModel.help: Model to use if the router fails or times out.

initTimeoutMs.label: Init Timeout (ms)
initTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for the embedding model to load on first use.

routeTimeoutMs.label: Route Timeout (ms)
routeTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time allowed for each routing decision.

logDecisions.label: Log Routing Decisions
logDecisions.help: Log which model was selected and why for each turn.

classificationThreshold.label: Classification Confidence Threshold
classificationThreshold.help: Minimum confidence (0-1) for the classifier to directly route to a class's model. Below this, the full scoring pipeline runs instead. Default 0.35. Lower values route more aggressively, higher values use the scoring engine more often.

strategyWeights.label: Strategy Weights
strategyWeights.help: Override scoring strategy weights (0-1). Keys: capability-match, complexity-tier-match, cost-optimization, latency-optimization, context-window-fit.

blockedModels.label: Blocked Models
blockedModels.help: Model IDs to exclude from routing (e.g. 'openai/gpt-4o').

preferredProviders.label: Preferred Providers
preferredProviders.help: Prefer models from these providers when scores are close.

preferredTier.label: Preferred Tier
preferredTier.help: Prefer models from this tier when scores are close.
